perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A hand holds a white 3D-printed model of a square foldable device. (2) A man wearing a grey flat cap, glasses, and a red sweater appears in front of a display of smartphones in a retail shop. (3) The man holds the white foldable model, showing its front and back. (4) A split-screen comparison shows the white model's thickness next to a silver foldable smartphone. (5) Close-ups of the white model's surface showing small circular sensors and a side-mounted button area. (6) The back of the white model is compared with the back of a white smartphone with a single camera lens. (7) Final shot compares the white model side-by-side with a large-screen foldable smartphone displaying a home screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo Lo-fi electronic music begins. A male voice speaks rapidly and excitedly in Mandarin. (2) Sound effects including a 'shing' or sparkle sound occur when visual highlights appear. (3) The male voice maintains a consistent, professional yet enthusiastic tone throughout. (4) Ambient noise is minimal, suggesting a controlled indoor environment or high-quality directional microphone usage.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese throughout the video translating the narration. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '傳聞的 iPhone 摺疊' (Rumored iPhone Fold) in bold blue/white/yellow. '被 3D 列印出來了' (Has been 3D printed). '推薦大家買手機到米可' (Recommend everyone buy phones at miko). (3) Technical labels: 'Maker World', '外螢幕 5.4-5.5 吋', '內螢幕 7.6-7.8 吋', '一模一樣的薄' (Exactly the same thinness), 'Face ID', 'Touch ID', 'Air 是單鏡頭' (Air is single lens), '雙鏡頭' (Dual lens), 'Galaxy Z Fold 7'.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro with 3D model -> Talking head in shop -> Detailed spec comparison -> Conclusion with size comparison.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim哥) appearing on screen and holding objects.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged male, wearing a grey patterned flat cap, black-rimmed glasses, and a vibrant red long-sleeved sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Background alternates between a retail shelf filled with smartphone boxes (Vivo, Realme) and a plain purple/grey studio wall.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Breakdown -> Comparison -> Engagement
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to discuss rumored specifications of a future Apple foldable phone by using a physical 3D-printed model from 'Maker World'. It serves as both a tech rumor update and a subtle endorsement for the 'miko' mobile phone shop.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A large banner at the top of the video and verbal recommendations encourage viewers to buy phones at 'miko'.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Tim哥's signature red sweater and flat cap styling.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes high-interest tech rumors (iPhone Fold) to drive traffic to a retail brand, combining news-style reporting with commercial placement.
